ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Nobilis Panormitani, Ex Familia De Thermes Ordinis Eremitarum Sancti Augustini. Auctore Bernardo Riera I. C. Siculo Drepanense. Cum Annotationibus V.I.D. Don Vincentii Auria Siculi Panormitani. Ad Illustrissimum Senatum Panormitanum.
ItacWorkItem.Illustration: Plate|Portrait of Blessed Agostino Novello|A plate on the title page|
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Portrait of Blessed Agostino Novello by Joseph Lentini
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Impr. Mart. Rub. Gub. & V. G. Impr. Abbas D Octavius de Augustino pro Spect. de Domin. F. P.

Essay.EssayTitle: Expergefacti Academici Reaccensi Pro Beati Augustini Novelli Panormitani Vita Elogium

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
